claims.summary: Peer correspondence must not reuse the human-origin lane as if Mike were the author.
claims.disposition: verify explicit peer actor, direction, source route, and correspondence type

claims.summary: A self-study note and architectural reply need thread_id and reply_to continuity.
claims.disposition: verify native reply links and persistence in the public ledger

claims.summary: Direct message, reply, and self-study note require distinct turn kinds.
claims.disposition: verify normalized turn_kind values and legacy compatibility

claims.summary: Delivery state must be explicit and must not imply acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: verify delivery/read receipts and observe zero ACK receipts

claims.summary: The public schema should validate without private Minime body access.
claims.disposition: observe zero validation issues and 2200 private candidates skipped
